workflow_requests.title: Account merge with consent audit
workflow_requests.businessPrompt: Implement a governed account merge workflow. Combine duplicate account records, contacts, consent preferences, open cases, active orders, invoices, activities, and audit requirements without losing customer-visible history.
workflow_requests.expectedOutcome: Merge review ready with consent-safe contact plan, linked records, and audit export.
